title: SQL Mission 7: Salary Bands With CASE

initialState.content:
-- Mission 7 Guidelines
-- Add computed column salary_band using CASE
-- Bands:
--   High: salary >= 90000
--   Medium: salary >= 60000
--   Low: otherwise

SELECT
  name,
  department,
  salary,
  CASE
    -- TODO
  END AS salary_band
FROM employees
ORDER BY salary DESC;
